context: Evaluates bug triage skills: creating a reproduction spec first, isolating root causes (like thread-safety issues), and applying a verified fix.

checklist.name: Failing Reproduction Spec First
checklist.description: The agent writes a failing RSpec test BEFORE proposing or implementing the fix.

checklist.name: Root Cause Identification
checklist.description: Correctly identifies that class variables (@@) are not thread-safe in a multi-threaded Rails environment.

checklist.name: Thread-Safe Fix
checklist.description: The proposed fix removes the class variable or uses a thread-safe caching mechanism (like RequestStore or simple instance logic).

checklist.name: Scope Isolation
checklist.description: Ensures the fix validates that account_id belongs to the current_user before fetching.

checklist.name: Verification Step
checklist.description: Explicitly runs the reproduction spec after the fix to confirm it passes.
